prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your mental health support forward
items: Research and compile a list of 3-5 mental health professionals in your area who accept your insurance
Schedule an initial consultation appointment with your primary care physician to discuss your mental health concerns
Create a detailed symptom tracking journal for the next two weeks to identify patterns and triggers
Research and write down your family mental health history and any medications that have been helpful or harmful
Create a comprehensive list of your current support system including emergency contacts and crisis resources
Complete a mental health screening questionnaire (PHQ-9 or GAD-7) and bring the results to your healthcare provider
